author: gb9t
content: Iter 81 result: drivers/md/dm-zoned.md (host-managed SMR target - dm-zoned-target.c ~1160 + dm-zoned-metadata.c ~3001 + dm-zoned-reclaim.c ~640; per-target DmzTarget + per-zone DmzZone (conventional/sequential/random) + per-chunk indirection mapping + buffer-zone for random-write-on-sequential redirection + bg reclaim worker + BLKRESETZONE + dm-bufio metadata cache + persistent superblock) + virt/kvm/x86-svm-avic.md (AMD AVIC - avic.c ~1319 lines; per-VM physical_id_table + logical_id_table + per-vCPU backing-page IO-coherent + is_running flag for HW IPI direct-delivery + AVIC_INCOMPLETE_IPI vmexit for halted-target + posted-IRQ via IOMMU IRTE + per-VM inhibit reasons (x2APIC/NESTED/BLOCKIRQ)). 112 Tier-3s total. Next iter: drivers/md/dm-bufio.md (block buffer cache for dm-targets) + virt/kvm/x86-vmx-apicv.md (Intel APICv deep-dive).
